Package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan

package org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed16a
     
    org.projecthusky.fhir.emed.ch.epr.model.emediplan.chmed23a
     
  • Class
    Description
    CdTyp9
    HCI INDEX CdTyp9 table.
    EMediplan<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,M extends EMediplanMedicament<E>,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class to model an eMediplan document object, be it of CHMED16A or CHMED23A specs.
    EMediplanEnum<T>
     
    EMediplanExtendable<E extends EMediplanObject>
    Base interface for an eMediplan object that is extendable, that is, that may contain a list of extensions.
    EMediplanGender
    Extension of the eMediplan enumeration interface intended for a patient administrative gender.
    EMediplanHealthcareOrganization<A extends EMediplanPostalAddress>
     
    EMediplanHealthcarePerson
    Abstract base model for an eMediplan HealthcarePerson object, used in both CHMED16A ePrescription and CHMED23A eMediplan documents.
    EMediplanHealthcareProCarrier<P extends EMediplanHealthcarePerson,O extends EMediplanHealthcareOrganization>
    Interface for an object that carries information about healthcare professionals in the context of an eMediplan document.
    EMediplanIdentifier
    Extension of the EMediplanObject interface that adds a method to convert an eMediplan object translatable to a FHIR Identifier to such an identifier.
    EMediplanMedicament<E extends EMediplanObject>
    A base class for an eMediplan medicament object.
    EMediplanObject
    Abstraction of an eMediplan (JSON) object.
    EMediplanPatient<E extends EMediplanObject,G extends EMediplanGender,I extends EMediplanIdentifier>
    Base class for modelling an eMediplan patient object, be it for CHMED16A or CHMED23A.
    EMediplanPatientMedicalData<E extends EMediplanObject>
     
    EMediplanPosology
    Base class for an eMediplan posology object.
    EMediplanPostalAddress
     
    EMediplanRisk
    This sould be an enum representation of the CDSCODE table of HCI INDEX used by the eMediplan specification paired with RiskCategory.
    EMediplanRiskList
    Models the RiskCategory object of eMediplan, that contains risks grouped by category.
    EMediplanType
    Called MedicationType in ChMed specifications.
    MedicamentIdType
     
    RiskCategory
